deleteAccount.warningTitle: Your GdeiAssistant account will be deleted
deleteAccount.riskTitle: After deletion, the following information will be permanently removed and cannot be recovered:

risk.account: Your account and all profile information will be cleared
risk.posts: All published content such as confessions, topics, and delivery posts will be permanently deleted
risk.interactions: All interaction records such as comments and likes will be removed
risk.academic: Custom schedules and saved CET admission ticket numbers will be deleted
risk.community: User data and transaction records on community platforms will be cleared
risk.identity: Linked phone numbers, email addresses, and other identity information will be deleted

deleteAccount.irreversible: This action cannot be undone. Please proceed with caution.
deleteAccount.agreement: I have read and understand the consequences above

campus.nanhai: Nanhai Campus of Guangdong Light Industry

faq.moreHelpSuffix: Tell us your questions and suggestions.

login.title: What are the username and password for login?
login.content: Use the same username and password as your campus network or academic system account. If you are not sure, check the guide in About - Campus Network Account Guide.

password.title: Can I change my password in the app?
password.content: Please change it through the university unified authentication system. After that, log back into GdeiAssistant to sync the new password. The app does not store your login password separately.

schedule.title: Why do grades or schedule queries show system errors?
schedule.content: Academic queries depend on the university website and academic system. When the source service is under maintenance or updating, queries may temporarily fail and usually recover within 24 hours. If the issue lasts longer, submit a feedback ticket here.

cache.title: What is academic data cache, and is it safe?
cache.content: Academic data cache syncs grades and schedules from the university academic system with your authorization to improve speed and stability. It is used only for academic display and is not shared externally. You can disable it at any time in privacy settings.

delete.title: How do I delete my account?
delete.content: You can request deletion in Profile - Delete Account. The system will verify your password and check whether the account meets deletion requirements. If self-service deletion is unavailable, submit a ticket here or email support{'@'}gdeiassistant.cn.

about.appIntroContent: GdeiAssistant is a campus service application exclusively built for Guangdong University of Education. It provides comprehensive academic features such as timetable, grades, CET scores, empty classroom search, library search, borrowing records, teaching evaluation, electricity bills, yellow pages, campus card info, transaction history, and card loss reporting, as well as community platforms including second-hand trading, lost & found, campus confessions, dating, confession wall, delivery, campus photography, topics, and anonymous course reviews. GdeiAssistant aims to deliver top-quality information on teaching, campus life, club activities, entertainment, and academic services for all students and faculty.
about.cookieNotice: This site uses cookies and browser storage to remember your sign-in status, interface preferences, data source selection, and dismissal of this notice. By continuing, you acknowledge this information.
about.chineseOnlyNotice: The legal text on this page is currently available in Chinese only.
